# Flier

> A modern email marketing platform with Gmail API integration for personalized bulk email campaigns.

## Overview
Flier is a powerful email marketing platform that seamlessly integrates with Gmail API to send personalized bulk emails, manage contacts, create templates, and track campaign performance.

## Key Features
- **Email Campaign Management** — Create, schedule, and send bulk email campaigns
- **Contact Management** — Import contacts from Gmail, CSV upload, and group organization
- **Template System** — Rich text email templates with version history
- **Analytics Dashboard** — Campaign metrics, funnel analysis, global leaderboard, heatmap
- **Real-time Tracking** — Open rates, click tracking, device breakdown
- **A/B Testing** — Compare campaign variants
- **Team Collaboration** — Multi-user team support with audit logs
- **GDPR Compliance** — Built-in privacy and unsubscribe management
- **Drip Campaigns** — Automated email sequences
- **Spam Checking** — Pre-send spam score analysis

## Pages
- `/` — Landing page
- `/dashboard` — Main dashboard
- `/compose` — Compose email campaign
- `/contacts` — Contact management
- `/contacts/duplicates` — Duplicate contact handling
- `/templates` — Email templates
- `/insights` — Campaign analytics
- `/ab-testing` — A/B testing
- `/draft` — Saved drafts
- `/realtime-send` — Real-time sending
- `/settings` — Settings
- `/settings/teams` — Team management
- `/settings/audit-logs` — Audit logs
- `/settings/gdpr` — GDPR settings
- `/settings/unsubscribes` — Unsubscribe management
- `/settings/webhooks` — Webhook configuration
- `/settings/signatures` — Email signatures
- `/api-docs` — API documentation
- `/privacy` — Privacy policy
- `/tos` — Terms of service

## Tech Stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- Appwrite (Backend)
- Gmail API
- React Query
- Tailwind CSS
